name: Shibori
description: Indigo cloth tie-dyed in rings — each binding blooms white where the dye couldn’t reach, re-pinched on every redraw.

code.style: --dye: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2)); --rule: ( /* ring and pinch share one emitted center so the binding stays tied */ --cxx: @r(30, 54); --cyy: @r(30, 54); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: calc(@var(--cxx) * 1% - @rand(16%, 26%)); top: calc(@var(--cyy) * 1% - @rand(16%, 26%)); @size: @rand(38%, 62%); border: calc(44px / @Y) solid var(--dye); border-radius: @rand(42%, 58%) @rand(42%, 58%) @rand(42%, 58%) @rand(42%, 58%); filter: blur(calc(16px / @Y)); opacity: @rand(0.6, 0.95); box-sizing: border-box; transition: ease 800ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: calc(@var(--cxx) * 1%); top: calc(@var(--cyy) * 1%); @size: 7%; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color1); filter: blur(calc(8px / @Y)); transition: ease 800ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
